understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by placing every selectable piece onto a corresponding goal tile (+) simultaneously in each level, achieving a WIN condition to complete the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece (P), potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks (B) if space allows; walls (#) block movement variably based on interaction; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece (S) at exact pixel coordinates [x,y]; all pieces must occupy goals at once for victory, with finite steps per level.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by placing every selectable piece onto a corresponding goal tile (+) simultaneously in each level, achieving a WIN condition to complete the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece (P), potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks (B) if space allows; walls (#) block movement variably based on interaction; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece (S) at exact pixel coordinates [x,y]; all pieces must occupy goals at once for victory, with finite steps per level.
